text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can do this... I can do this! I can do this! I can do
this... I can dooo thiiissss!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll shine more than any other racer at the Arima
Kinen. I won't shy away—I'll stand strong!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you know... I think we've never seen
anything like this before.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, Special Week, Grass Wonder...
Everyone is so strong and in perfect form.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't plan on backing down. I'm ready to run
until my legs give out! But... will that be enough
to win?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is the toughest of them all. Even when
completely surrounded, the Overlord always
powers through.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has amazing concentration, and
Special Week's amazing down the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Do you think there's anything special about me? I
searched and searched, but I couldn't find
anything.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm terrible... There's so much wrong with me...
Trying my best is my only option.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't have anything to brag about. There's
nothing unique about me, nothing at all! So...
choice_data_list: Your lack of confidence is your strength.
Your lack of confidence is your strength.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, my lack of... confidence? I thought... that was my weakness.

I quietly nod. Her worries are precisely why she
works so hard to counter every little thing that
could go wrong.

She's incapable of giving in, and it's shown in her
persistent effort to climb all the way here.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've never thought about it that way... No one has
gotten this far having so many mishaps.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I tried and tried, but I was never enough. So, I
had to try and try until I made it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
As usual, I don't feel confident today. That's why I
must stay vigilant—I can't afford to relax...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Not until I've reached the very, very end! Not
until I've finished first! So...
choice_data_list: Right, I know you can win!
Right, I know you can win!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're right, Trainer! I do have a treasure of my own, something one of a kind!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
With it, I can take on Opera O and the two more
experienced runners, all while shining bright!
